tasks.subject: Task 1: Chunk base — difficulty, sampler_include, random_params
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `difficulty: int = 0`, `sampler_include: bool = True`, and `random_params(cls, rng) -> dict` (default returns `{}`) to the `Chunk` base class.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/levels/chunks/base.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_chunks.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Chunk exposes class attrs difficulty=0 and sampler_include=True.
- [ ] Chunk.random_params(rng) is a classmethod returning {}.
- [ ] Test asserts defaults on Flat.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_chunks.py -v`

**Steps:** Failing test → add attrs + classmethod → run test → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/base.py", "tests/test_chunks.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_chunks.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Chunk has difficulty=0 default", "Chunk has sampler_include=True default", "Chunk.random_params(rng) returns {} by default"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Assign difficulty values to existing chunks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tag every existing chunk type with its difficulty and sampler_include per the spec tables; override random_params on chunks the sampler must randomize.

**Files:**
- Modify: all 10 existing chunk modules under `src/blueball/levels/chunks/`
- Modify: `tests/test_chunks.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Difficulty and sampler_include match spec table.
- [ ] random_params overridden on flat, gap, spike_pit, bump, boost_pad, falling_hazard, patrol_platform, stairs_up, stairs_down.
- [ ] Tests assert one representative per tier and excludes for goal/ability_pickup.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_chunks.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/flat.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/gap.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/spike_pit.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/patrol_platform.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/stairs.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/bump.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/falling_hazard.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/goal.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/ability_pickup.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/boost_pad.py", "tests/test_chunks.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_chunks.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Flat.difficulty=0", "Gap.difficulty=1", "SpikePit.difficulty=2", "FallingHazardChunk.difficulty=3", "GoalChunk.sampler_include=False", "AbilityPickupChunk.sampler_include=False"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Player API additions — keys, respawn, key methods, receive_spring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend Player with keys_held bitfield, respawn_xy, collect_key, has_key, receive_spring. No motion changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/entities/player.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_player.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Player initializes keys_held=0, respawn_xy=None.
- [ ] collect_key(id) sets bit; idempotent.
- [ ] has_key(id) returns matching boolean.
- [ ] receive_spring(impulse) applies (0, -impulse*mass) at body center.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_player.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/player.py", "tests/test_player.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_player.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Player.keys_held=0 at init", "Player.respawn_xy=None at init", "collect_key sets bit", "has_key reads bit", "receive_spring applies mass-scaled upward impulse"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: World.add_entity wires entity._world
tasks.description:
**Goal:** World.add_entity sets entity._world = self so entities can query space.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/world.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_player.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] After world.add_entity(p), p._world is world.
- [ ] Existing entities unaffected.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/ -v` (no regressions)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/world.py", "tests/test_player.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Player._world == world after add_entity"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Player ShapeFilter group for raycast self-exclusion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Assign Player.shape a unique ShapeFilter group; expose Player._ray_filter for use in segment_query_first.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/entities/player.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_player.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_PLAYER_RAY_GROUP = 1` constant defined.
- [ ] Player.shape.filter.group == _PLAYER_RAY_GROUP.
- [ ] Player._ray_filter is a ShapeFilter(group=_PLAYER_RAY_GROUP).
- [ ] segment_query_first through the ball with _ray_filter returns None.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_player.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/entities/player.py", "tests/test_player.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_player.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Player shape filter group set", "_ray_filter excludes own shape"]}
```


tasks.subject: Task 7: New CT_* constants in collision.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 8 new collision-type constants: CT_ONE_WAY=8, CT_SPRING=9, CT_PUSHABLE=10, CT_SWINGING=11, CT_CHARGER=12, CT_CHECKPOINT=13, CT_KEY=14, CT_DOOR=15.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/collision.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_collision.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 8 constants defined with correct values.
- [ ] All distinct from each other and existing CTs.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_collision.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/collision.py", "tests/test_collision.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_collision.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CT_ONE_WAY=8", "CT_DOOR=15", "all 8 constants distinct"]}
```

- Modify: tests/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CrumblingPlatform static segment.
- [ ] AABB-overlap probe detects contact in update().
- [ ] Removes after crumble_delay_s post-contact.
- [ ] Chunk difficulty=2.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_entities.py tests/test_chunks.py -v`


tasks.subject: Task 20: Charger — enemy with FOV + LOS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Kinematic enemy patrolling a bounded segment; charges at player when in FOV cone AND LOS clear. Top-stomp kills it; side contact kills player.

- Modify: `src/blueball/collision.py`
- Modify: `src/blueball/levels/chunks/__init__.py`
- Modify: tests/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Patrols at patrol_speed within bounds.
- [ ] State switches to charge when player in FOV cone + LOS clear.
- [ ] Reverts to patrol on LOS loss / bound reached.
- [ ] Top-stomp kills it (n.y ≥ TOL).
- [ ] Chunk difficulty=3.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_entities.py tests/test_collision.py tests/test_chunks.py -v`


tasks.subject: Task 25: ChunkSampler — deterministic procedural emitter
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deterministic sampler emitting chunk-dict sequence with soft difficulty ramp, periodic checkpoints, goal terminator.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/blueball/levels/sampler.py`
- Create: `tests/test_sampler.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two ChunkSampler(seed=N) instances yield identical sequences.
- [ ] Sequence ends with one {type:goal}.
- [ ] Every non-checkpoint/goal entry has sampler_include=True.
- [ ] Last quartile avg difficulty > first quartile.
- [ ] Checkpoints appear at progress indices N, 2N, ... per checkpoint_every.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_sampler.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/sampler.py", "tests/test_sampler.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_sampler.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sampler deterministic per seed", "sequence ends with goal", "difficulty ramps with progress"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 26: MenuScene + main.py entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MenuScene with 5 entries; main.py starts in MenuScene; selecting builds and returns PlayScene.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/blueball/scenes/menu.py`
- Modify: `main.py`
- Create: `tests/test_menu_scene.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] MenuScene lists 5 entries (Tutorial Hill, Vertical Climb, Speed Run, Maze, Infinite Run).
- [ ] Up/Down + W/S move cursor; bounded.
- [ ] Enter on normal level returns PlayScene with level_path.
- [ ] Enter on Infinite Run returns PlayScene with level_data + sampler_seed.
- [ ] Esc returns None.
- [ ] main.py starts in MenuScene.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_menu_scene.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/menu.py", "main.py", "tests/test_menu_scene.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_menu_scene.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 menu entries", "infinite run wires sampler", "esc quits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 27: PlayScene updates — level_data, esc-to-menu, checkpoint respawn
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PlayScene accepts level_path OR level_data; returns to MenuScene on Esc and on level-complete; restores from respawn_xy on death.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/scenes/play.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_play_scene.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] __init__(screen, level_path=None, level_data=None, sampler_seed=None); exactly one of path/data must be set.
- [ ] _reset overrides player.body.position with _last_respawn_xy when set.
- [ ] On death, snapshots respawn_xy before _reset.
- [ ] On level_complete, sets _exit_to_menu, clears _last_respawn_xy.
- [ ] handle_events returns MenuScene on _exit_to_menu or Esc.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_play_scene.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "tests/test_play_scene.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_play_scene.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PlayScene accepts level_data", "esc returns MenuScene", "checkpoint respawn restores position"]}
```
